name: Three Flavored Fried Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Raw shrimp; shelled and deveined
1 small piece ginger or 1/4 teaspoon ground ginger (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Set ingredients prepared and measured on the stove in the order listed.
2. Place a wok over high heat for 30 seconds. Add half the oil and swirl to coat the pan.
3. Count to 20, then add green onions and ginger (or ground ginger) and stir-fry lightly.
4. Add shrimp and stir-fry for 3 minutes until just cooked through.
5. Add beaten eggs and scramble until nearly done. Transfer to a warm plate.
6. Return the wok to heat and swirl in the remaining oil. Count to 20, then add pork and chicken.
7. Stir-fry for 2 minutes until heated through.
8. Add rice, soy sauce, pepper, and salt (if used). Toss to combine.
9. Mix in lettuce and stir until evenly distributed.
10. Serve immediately before the lettuce wilts.
